allow: Bash(npm install openai react-markdown remark-gfm rehype-highlight highlight.js @uiw/react-codemirror @codemirror/lang-markdown @codemirror/language-data clsx tailwind-merge 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(node -e "const cm = require\('@uiw/react-codemirror'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(cm\).filter\(k => k.includes\('update'\) || k.includes\('Update'\) || k.includes\('View'\)\)\)" 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(npm uninstall @uiw/react-codemirror @codemirror/lang-markdown @codemirror/language-data react-markdown remark-gfm rehype-highlight highlight.js 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(git add .gitignore README.md app/ components/ eslint.config.mjs hooks/ next.config.ts package-lock.json package.json postcss.config.mjs public/ tsconfig.json types/ && git status 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: AI markdown notes editor

Next.js 16 WYSIWYG notes app with Tiptap editor, OpenAI streaming,
floating AI toolbar on text selection, and AI chat sidebar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(gh repo create notetaker --public --description "AI-powered WYSIWYG markdown notes app built with Next.js and OpenAI" --source . --remote origin --push 2>&1)
Bash(git add app/globals.css app/layout.tsx app/page.tsx components/AISidebar.tsx components/AIToolbar.tsx components/Editor.tsx)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Redesign UI with warm editorial aesthetic and improved UX

- Add Playfair Display + Lora serif fonts for titles and editor body
- Introduce warm off-white color system \(CSS variables throughout\)
- Center editor content at max-w-3xl for optimal reading line length
- Show relative timestamps on sidebar note items for easier navigation
- Add amber left-border accent on active note, spring easing on AI sidebar
- Glassmorphic AI toolbar with scale+fade entrance animation
- Refined AI sidebar chat bubbles and send button states

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(claude mcp add --scope project --transport http supabase "https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp?project_ref=tigybmypogsmfiutqjpk")
Bash(npm install turndown && npm install --save-dev @types/turndown 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Add tree-view indent guide lines aligned to bullet disc centers" && git push)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Increase h1 bottom margin for more spacing below document title" && git push)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Remove note title input from header, remove accent border indicators" && git push)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Remove accent border indicators from note items and search modal" && git push)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Convert to monochrome theme: white light mode, black dark mode" && git push)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Add floating AI button, account avatar with popover sign-out, move actions to cmd+k" && git push)
